title: Crafting Changes
description: Tweaks crafting recipes as a data pack to add more ways to craft things that feel they should be able to be crafted that way.
body:
A data pack that adds new crafting recipes to the game.
# v1.0.2
<details>
<summary>Features</summary>
 
- Craft a cobweb with string
 
- Craft the minecart types by putting them in the middle while crafting a normal minecart
 
- Craft mushroom blocks out of their base mushrooms
 
- Uncraft mushroom blocks
 
- Smelt raw ore blocks to get a smelted block of that raw ore block
 
- Craft Spectral Arrows with Glow Inc Sacs, Glow Berries, or Glow Lichen
 
- Smelt any sapling into a dead bush
  
- Craft two dripstone blocks into two dripstone
  
- Craft any wool into 4 string
  
  
- Craft a magma block into 4 magma cream
  
- Craft a snow block into 4 snow balls

- Craft a Trident out of 2 prismarine crystals and three iron ingots
</details>
